user.title: Set up Wolt account
user.description: Enter tokens from wolt.com. The analytics session ID is optional. Venue IDs are the slugs from the venue URL; separate multiple IDs by new lines.

init.title: Update Wolt settings
init.description: Update tokens or venue IDs. The analytics session ID is optional. Venue IDs are slugs from the venue URL; separate multiple IDs by new lines.
